trigger_conditions: there is no explicit eligible reserve candidate
or the live pool does not have enough healthy/valid accounts for safe stage-20 progression
required_action: do not run rollout stage advance 20 <id> --json
reopen only the blocking pool/readiness contour
guardrails: do not proceed if no explicit reserve candidate can be named
do not hide the stop behind UI work
24 active / 0 reserve is not a substitute for reserve-first proof
